data.content: The project uses **MSTest v3.8.0** with the Microsoft Testing Platform enabled. Tests are categorized via `[TestCategory]`. Let me run only the integration tests:

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Run integration tests filtered by category

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Run integration tests filtered by category

data.reasoningText:
The project uses **MSTest** (v3.8.0) with the Microsoft Testing Platform (`TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport=true` in Directory.Build.props). The tests are categorized with `[TestCategory("Unit")]` and `[TestCategory("Integration")]`.

To run only the integration tests, I need to filter by category. With MSTest on the Microsoft Testing Platform, the filter syntax for `dotnet test` is `--filter "TestCategory=Integration"`.

arguments.description: Run integration tests filtered by category

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-ec40ae088fe44aadbf99d4c294d1734b && dotnet test --filter \"TestCategory=Integration\" 2>&1", "description": "Run integration tests filtered by category", "initial_wait": 60}

toolArgs.description: Run integration tests filtered by category
